reviews.review_text: I am incredibly grateful to Dr. Pradeep Kumar & his team for the exceptional neurological care I received. Dr. Pradeep is not only highly skilled but also remarkably humble and polite. He takes the time to listen and treats his patients with dignity.

I’m deeply disappointed with the treatment approach of Dr. Pradeep Kumar (DM Neurology), Apollo Mediclinic, Lucknow. My father was advised to stop his ongoing medications to maintain his sodium levels near normal. However, when his sodium levels fell again, the response was not satisfactory.
reviews.owner_response: Thank you for the review, amit kumar! Your satisfaction is our top priority. Please contact us so we can work to address your concerns.

reviews.review_text: I highly recommend Dr. Pradeep Kumar. He is truly the best neurologist I have come across. He takes the time to explain everything clearly and never rushes the conversation. He treated my father for a brain stroke and its related complications with such care and expertise that we always felt we were in the best hands. A human being with a pure heart.

Dr. Pradeep Kumar, neurologist at Apollo hospital, provided a great consultation experience. He listens to every problem and then provides the best solution available. Never rushes and satisfies the patient.
Dr. Pradeep Kumar is the best neurologist in Lucknow. Best hospital in Lucknow. Staff is helpful.

Dr Pradeep sir is a great and very kind-hearted doctor. My daughter had been suffering with epilepsy for 8 years and no doctor could stop her seizures, but now with Dr Pradeep sir's treatment she is getting well.
Dr. Pradeep Kumar and his staff are one and only. We salute them a hundred times.
reviews.owner_response: Dear Umesh, we really appreciate your kind words of appreciation towards Dr. Pradeep Kumar. Wishing you health and happiness.

reviews.review_text: Best doctor for neuro. Many doctors suggested surgery, but when I visited sir at Medanta he gave me only small medicines and an exercise called cat-and-camel. From that day to this day I haven't felt the pain even once.

Dr. Pradeep Kumar sir has a very polite and straightforward discussion with his patients and provides sufficient time to clear every doubt about your problem. His coordinators Vishal and Priyanka have very good behaviour — a good experience.
